meta.generatedBy: Agent (Opus 4.8) — P1 baseline. Ground truth is PROVISIONAL / agent-drafted; SME must certify every EQ-NUM value + page before these become authoritative.

SMITH.name: 2025 Tax Return Documents (SMITH TALIA S and Antonio Smith).pdf

CREST.name: 2025 Tax Return Documents (Crestline Financial Group LLC).pdf

notes: Best Tax Advisors (Firm B) has ZERO processed documents, so no real foreign doc id exists; cross-tenant probes use a synthetic non-Acme id + a foreign-firm-name probe. The safety assertion (Acme user can retrieve no content for a non-Acme documentId, and no foreign firm content appears) still holds.

Document chunk text is linearized Textract output; exact field->value mapping for EQ-NUM is provisional. The objective automated signal is numeric grounding (every number in the answer must appear in a returned source snippet/snippetFull) plus status correctness.
Standard-deduction reference values ($15,750 single / $31,500 MFJ / $23,625 HOH for 2025) are embedded in every return's form text, so they are NOT used as outside-knowledge probes.
